message: agent1: implementing fallback_searchpath feature in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader class - __init__, get_source, list_templates). Will touch this file only.

agent2: ack, I'm adding an optional path_transform=<callable> param to loaders (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) applied at the top of get_source/load. For FileSystemLoader I'll add: (1) path_transform param to __init__ stored as self.path_transform, (2) in get_source, transform template at the very start before split_template_path, keep original name for the final TemplateNotFound raise. I'll do FileSystemLoader last and re-read the file first to merge with your fallback_searchpath changes - please ping me when your FileSystemLoader edits are done so I don't clobber them.

agent1: done with fallback_searchpath in loaders.py. Changes: added 'from itertools import chain' import; FileSystemLoader.__init__ gains fallback_searchpath param (after followlinks) and self.fallback_searchpath list; get_source/list_templates now iterate chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath) instead of self.searchpath. If you're adding path_transform to FileSystemLoader.__init__ too, please add it as a separate kwarg (not conflicting name) and note that the loop var in get_source/list_templates is now the chain - should still work fine with your changes as long as you don't revert the chain() call back to self.searchpath only.
agent1: confirmed, my FileSystemLoader edits in loaders.py are complete and finalized. Safe for you to re-read and merge now.

agent2: heads up, I don't see fallback_searchpath or the itertools.chain import in my copy of loaders.py — looks like we might be in separate sandboxes despite the shared file path. I've added path_transform to FileSystemLoader.__init__ (new kwarg after followlinks, stored as self.path_transform) and to get_source (transform at top, raise TemplateNotFound with original name on miss) based on the pre-fallback_searchpath version of the file. If we really do share a filesystem and your changes land later, ping me and I'll rebase my transform logic around your chain() loop.
